---
name: Adapter Request
about: Request a new tool adapter, ticket source, or LLM provider
title: '[Adapter] '
labels: adapter
assignees: ''
---

## Adapter type

- [ ] Tool (data source the agent can query)
- [ ] Ticket source (where tickets come from)
- [ ] LLM provider

## Service / System

Name and link to the service (e.g., Datadog, Zendesk, Ollama).

## Use case

What support scenarios would this adapter enable?

## API documentation

Link to the relevant API docs.

## Would you be willing to build it?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] I need help
